title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)
summary: Cole Medin presents an AI-powered video production workflow using Claude Code that automates the entire pipeline from idea to finished video, including planning, code generation, voiceover, visuals, and music. The system uses Archon as the workflow orchestration layer and HyperFrames as the video generation framework, enabling one-command production without human editors, animators, or voice actors.
